tools.name: outlook_unsubscribe
tools.description: Unsubscribe from a mailing list by following the List-Unsubscribe header on an Outlook message. Include a confidence score (0-1).

message_id.description: An Outlook message ID from the mailing list to unsubscribe from

activity.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Outlook account to use. Required when multiple Outlook accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.
